# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  FunctionAppWithIdentity:
    Type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    Properties:
      name: ServerlessMicroservicesFunctionApp
      location: West Europe
      serverFarmId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/ServerlessMicroservicesPlan'
      httpsOnly: true
      identity: 
        type: SystemAssigned
    DependsOn: ServerlessMicroservicesPlan

  ServerlessMicroservicesPlan:
    Type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    Properties:
      name: ServerlessMicroservicesPlan
      location: West Europe
      sku:
        name: F1
      kind: functionapp

Outputs:
  FunctionAppId:
    Value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'ServerlessMicroservicesFunctionApp')]"
    Type: string
